problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor may resolve What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
